spec_match.rationale: The comparison now uses current position-try-order syntax and describes remembered scroll offset as automatic anchor-positioning behavior.

interactive.rationale: The page includes manual scroll, synchronized replay, deep-scroll sample, and reset controls.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The side-by-side panels compare legacy retargeting with the Chrome 135 CSS anchor path.

edge_cases.rationale: The replay and deep-scroll sample cover scripted lockstep movement and restored deep scroll offsets.

references.rationale: The page links to the correct ChromeStatus feature and CSS Anchor Positioning spec.

design_system.rationale: The page uses CSS variables and global button colors.

summary: The side-by-side comparison now has replay and deep-scroll controls and no longer teaches stale most-scroll-position syntax.
